Stick.description: It's just a stick. Hard to use and not very strong.

Wrench.description: A heavy wrench. Hits harder than a stick.

Sword.description: Metal single-edged longsword with a sharp blade. Energy efficient but needs two hands.

Shock Rod.description: An electrified rod that delivers a shocking blow. Zap!

Flame Thrower.description: Shoots fire. Everything is better with fire.

Laser Gun.description: Pew pew pew! A focused beam of pure energy.

Lightsabre.description: A laser sword. Very expensive! Bzzzzt.

Rocket Launcher.description: Fires explosive rockets. KABOOM! Not very accurate but who cares?

Chainsaw.description: VRRRRRR! A spinning chain of sharp teeth. One-handed destruction.

Plasma Cannon.description: Fires superheated plasma. Melts through anything.

Thunder Hammer.description: A massive hammer crackling with electricity. One hand. Maximum bonk.

Missile Launcher.description: Locks on and fires guided missiles. Consumes one Missile per shot.

Death Ray.description: A beam of pure destruction. Never misses. Ever.

Nuke Launcher.description: Launches a miniature nuclear warhead. Everything goes BOOM.

Antimatter Blade.description: A sword made of antimatter. Annihilates anything it touches.

Antimatter Missile Launcher.description: Fires antimatter missiles that erase things from existence. Each missile costs a fortune. Worth it.

Galaxy Destroyer.description: The ultimate weapon. Capable of destroying entire galaxies. Probably overkill for a robot fight.

Shotgun Shell.description: Ammo for the Sawed-off Shotgun. Consumed when fired. Max 60.

Missile.description: Ammo for the Missile Launcher. Consumed when fired. Max 30.

Antimatter Missile.description: Ammo for the Antimatter Missile Launcher. Consumed when launched. Max 3.

Cardboard Armor.description: Cheapest possible armor for a robot. Even a stick could break it.

Tin Armor.description: Shiny tin plates bolted together. Better than cardboard!

Iron Armor.description: Solid iron plating. Now we're talking.

Steel Armor.description: Industrial-grade steel. Tanks wish they had this.

Titanium Armor.description: Lightweight but incredibly strong. Space-age protection.

Diamond Armor.description: Coated in synthetic diamond. Sparkly AND tough.

Plasma Shield.description: A force field made of plasma. Sci-fi stuff. Very cool.

Cosmic Armor.description: Forged from the heart of a dying star. The ultimate protection.

Gold Computer Chip.description: A computer chip that teaches the robot how to defend itself. Protect the face!

Small Computer Chip.description: A computer chip that teaches the robot how to dodge. If you can dodge a wrench...

Power Chip.description: A computer chip that boosts attack power. Your attacks deal 10% more damage!

Targeting Scope.description: A targeting scope that improves aim. +10 accuracy to all weapons.

Advanced Chip.description: Advanced dodge programming. Matrix-style bullet dodging.

Auto-Aim Module.description: Advanced auto-aiming system. +20 accuracy to all weapons.

Mega Chip.description: Advanced defense protocols. Takes 5 less damage per hit.

Quantum Chip.description: Quantum probability dodging. The robot exists in multiple places at once.

Money Maker.description: Earn more money from winning. It takes money to make money!

Propeller.description: A spinning propeller that helps the robot dodge attacks.

Small Battery.description: A small battery that increases energy capacity.

Medium Battery.description: A medium battery that increases energy capacity.

Big Battery.description: A big battery that increases energy capacity.

Mega Battery.description: A huge battery. Powers the big guns.

Nuclear Battery.description: Powered by nuclear fission. Don't drop it.

Fusion Battery.description: Powered by nuclear fusion. Clean energy! (Mostly.)

Dark Matter Core.description: Harvested from the void between galaxies. Infinite-ish energy.

Repair Kit.useText: You deploy a Repair Kit, patching up damage with duct tape and hope!
Repair Kit.description: Repairs the robot. Duct tape and hope. Max 10.

Throwing Net.useText: You hurl a Throwing Net, tangling the enemy's legs!
Throwing Net.description: It's a net. You throw it. Destroys the net. Max 5.

Shield Boost.useText: You activate a Shield Boost, hardening your armor plating!
Shield Boost.description: Temporarily hardens your armor. +5 defence for the battle. Max 5.

Blast Shield.useText: You raise a Blast Shield, bracing for impact!
Blast Shield.description: A throwaway shield that absorbs one big hit. Blocks 35 damage this turn. Max 5.

Grenade.description: A small bomb you can launch at the enemy. BOOM! Max 10.

Targeting Lock.useText: You activate the Targeting Lock, locking onto the enemy!
Targeting Lock.description: Locks onto the enemy for improved aim. +30 temp accuracy for the battle. Max 3.

EMP Bomb.useText: You detonate an EMP Bomb, scrambling the enemy's circuits!
EMP Bomb.description: Electromagnetic pulse. Scrambles their dodge circuits. Max 3.

Mega Repair Kit.useText: You deploy a Mega Repair Kit. Industrial welders whir to life!
Mega Repair Kit.description: Industrial-grade repair tools. Welds, hammers, and lots of duct tape. Max 7.

Mega Blast Shield.useText: You slam down a Mega Blast Shield. Nothing's getting through!
Mega Blast Shield.description: Heavy duty blast shield. Blocks 120 damage this turn. Built like a tank door. Max 3.

Mega Grenade.useText: You lob a Mega Grenade. The whole arena shakes! KABOOM!
Mega Grenade.description: A BIGGER bomb. Shakes the whole arena. Max 7.

Force Field.useText: You activate a Force Field. A shimmering barrier surrounds you!
Force Field.description: Projects a temporary force field. +15 defence for the battle. Max 3.

Ultra Repair Kit.useText: You release a Nano Repair Swarm. Thousands of tiny bots fix everything!
Ultra Repair Kit.description: Nanotechnology repair swarm. Fixes everything instantly. Max 5.

Plasma Blast Shield.useText: You deploy a Plasma Blast Shield. Pure energy absorbs incoming fire!
Plasma Blast Shield.description: Plasma-reinforced blast shield. Blocks 300 damage this turn. Almost indestructible. Max 2.

Plasma Grenade.useText: You launch a Plasma Grenade. It melts AND explodes!
Plasma Grenade.description: Plasma-coated explosive. Melts and explodes at the same time! Max 5.

Antimatter Shield.useText: You activate an Antimatter Shield. Reality itself bends around you!
Antimatter Shield.description: Antimatter containment shield. Blocks 600 damage this turn. Laughs at nukes. Max 1.

Nuke.useText: You launch a Nuke. NUCLEAR EXPLOSION! Everything goes white!
Nuke.description: A miniature nuclear warhead. For when you absolutely need something destroyed. Max 5.
